gradient.$description: Arctic dark-mode gradient tokens — ice-blue and glacier-cyan. Direction uses extra fields beyond DTCG stops to capture Flutter LinearGradient begin/end alignment.

primary.$description: Primary gradient — ice blue to glacier cyan. Used on primary buttons and hero elements.

accent.$description: Accent gradient — glacier cyan to teal. Subtle highlight for surfaces and cards.

surface.$description: Surface gradient — very subtle ice-blue sheen. Color(0x1429B6F6) and Color(0x1426C6DA): alpha=0x14 (8% opacity).

surface-primary.$description: Surface gradient tinted with primary. Color(0x1929B6F6) and Color(0x190288D1): alpha=0x19 (10% opacity).

surface-accent.$description: Surface gradient tinted with accent. Color(0x1926C6DA) and Color(0x1900BCD4): alpha=0x19 (10% opacity).
